patterns.safer_alternative: Edit .env files manually or use a secrets manager. Never write secrets via shell redirection

patterns.description: Writing to known credential file paths
patterns.safer_alternative: Use your secrets manager or credential store. Never write credentials via shell commands

patterns.description: Exporting sensitive environment variables to shell
patterns.safer_alternative: Set secrets in .env files (not committed to git) and load via direnv or dotenv, not export
Use grep for specific variable names instead of displaying the entire file
Back up the profile file first (cp ~/.bashrc ~/.bashrc.bak), then edit
